description: Common bloatware on Sony Xperia devices

packages.name: Sony Music
packages.description: Sony music player. Substitute: Spotify, VLC.

packages.name: Sony Album (Gallery)
packages.description: Sony photo gallery. Substitute: Google Photos.

packages.name: Socialife
packages.description: Sony social media aggregator. Generally unused.

packages.name: Sony Conversations
packages.description: Sony messaging app. Substitute: Google Messages.

packages.name: Xperia Services Center
packages.description: Sony device management and telemetry service.

packages.name: Sony Persistent Service
packages.description: Core Sony background service. Removal may affect Xperia features.
